message:
test: add comprehensive unit tests for figma, plaid, s3 connectors and fcp-cli modules

Connector test coverage additions:
- figma/error.rs: Exhaustive Display tests for all BrowserError variants
  (Api with/without status code, InvalidConfig, Timeout, Serialization,
  Http, ElementNotFound, NavigationFailed, ScriptError, ScreenshotFailed,
  SessionExpired), From trait conversions, error categorization, Clone/Debug
  derives, and Result type alias verification
- plaid/error.rs + types.rs: Full error variant Display coverage,
  transaction/account/institution type construction, serde roundtrips,
  Clone/Debug/PartialEq derives, default values, builder patterns
- s3/error.rs + types.rs: All S3Error variants (AccessDenied, BucketNotFound,
  ObjectNotFound, InvalidKey, etc.), S3Config construction and validation,
  S3Object/ListResult/UploadResult type tests, multipart upload types

Core crate test coverage:
- fcp-cli/bench/cbor.rs: CBOR encoding/decoding roundtrips, size assertions,
  edge cases (empty payloads, large values, nested structures)
- fcp-cli/context/mod.rs: CLI context initialization, config loading,
  environment variable handling, default values, error paths

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
